channel.title: Building DataNexus on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Building DataNexus on Junho Lee

item.title: 4. Why We Added a SKOS Compatibility Layer
item.description: Why we chose SKOS to connect the DataNexus ontology with external systems. Designing a compatibility layer between LPG and RDF – two different graph models.

item.title: 3. Can DataHub's Glossary Work as an Ontology?
item.description: We tried using DataHub’s Business Glossary as an ontology store. What worked, what didn’t, and how we worked around it.

item.title: 2. How We Chose These 4 Open-Source Tools
item.description: How we decided on DataHub + Vanna + ApeRAG + DozerDB for DataNexus. What got eliminated from the candidate list, and why.

item.title: 1. Why We're Building DataNexus
item.description: The structural problems with enterprise data analytics, and why we decided to build an ontology-based data agent platform.
